description: Baseline: 987 tests passing, 0 failing across 41 files in warcraft-core

Fix slugifyTaskName consecutive hyphens, remove redundant double-slugification in parseTasksFromPlan, remove redundant buildEffectiveDependencies in computeRunnableStatus, filter undefined from worktreeService conflict arrays
Guard FilesystemPlanStore.approve and revokeApproval against missing feature.json to prevent writing corrupt empty objects
Fix Biome formatting for long conflict filter line in worktreeService.ts
Fix parseTasksFromPlan Depends on parsing for bold-colon markdown pattern (**Depends on:** 1, 2) that leaked asterisks into captured value causing dependency numbers to be dropped
Fix worktreeService merge conflict handler to read actual HEAD after abort instead of stale beforeHead (partial cherry-picks in rebase strategy advance HEAD)
Add validation for TaskService.create order parameter - reject zero, negative, and non-integer values that would produce malformed folder names
Fix inconsistent BOM handling in stripRedundantLeadingHeading - always strip BOM from content regardless of heading match, preventing invisible BOM characters from leaking into rendered context
Add explicit folderSource: 'stored' to FilesystemTaskStore.get() for consistency with BeadsTaskStore and to prevent future bugs from undefined folderSource
Fix Biome formatting for depends-on value parsing chain in taskService.ts
Fix slugifyTaskName to convert underscores to hyphens instead of stripping them - aligns with slugifyIdentifierSegment behavior. hello_world now produces hello-world instead of helloworld
Fix DockerSandboxService.containerName trailing hyphen after truncation - strip trailing hyphens from prefix before joining with hash to prevent double hyphens in container names
Fix computeTrustMetrics to filter out negative MTTR values caused by clock skew - only count resolved-blocked durations when resolve timestamp is >= blocked timestamp
Filter FilesystemFeatureStore.list() to only return directories containing feature.json - prevents non-feature directories (like docs/architecture) from appearing as phantom features
Fix slugifyTaskName and slugifyIdentifierSegment to normalize accented Unicode characters via NFD decomposition - Café→cafe, Résumé→resume instead of caf, r-sum
Add slug length truncation to slugifyTaskName - cap at 60 chars with hash suffix to prevent filesystem path length issues from very long task names
Fix Biome formatting in dockerSandboxService.test.ts and slug.test.ts
Add test verifying BOM characters are stripped from context files during compile - validates the BOM handling fix in context-markdown.ts
Add comprehensive tests for formatSpecContent - task header, dependencies, plan section, completed tasks, and task type inference (testing, greenfield, modification)

Add dedicated context-markdown.test.ts with 14 tests covering renderContextSection, renderContextSections, and appendContextContent including BOM stripping, heading normalization, and boundary trimming
Verify: 1022 tests passing across 42 files, all checks pass - comprehensive bug hunt complete
Cache defaults on config parse error in ConfigService.get() - prevents repeated file I/O and warning spam on corrupt config files, consistent with documented restart-required behavior
Baseline verification: 1022 tests passing, resuming bug hunt
Fix parseTasksFromPlan to handle bullet-point prefixed dependency lines (- Depends on: 1 and * **Depends on**: 1, 2) - previously silently ignored causing incorrect implicit sequential ordering
Fix getTaskBeadActions to handle dispatch_prepared status (maps to unclaim like pending) instead of returning empty array - prevents stale bead state if task transitions through dispatch_prepared

Add comprehensive beadStatus tests - mapBeadStatusToTaskStatus (closed, tombstone, review, hooked, blocked, empty, unknown, case-insensitive) and mapBeadStatusToFeatureStatus (all statuses, case-insensitive)
Add beadsMode.test.ts with 6 tests covering isBeadsEnabled and requireBeadsEnabled - previously untested utility module
Add edge case tests for artifactSchemas - unknown schema versions, minimal legacy payloads, raw non-JSON fallbacks for worker prompts and reports
Add factory.test.ts with 4 tests for store creation - verifies correct store types for on/off modes, repository requirement, and parameter isolation
Add bv-runner.test.ts with 8 tests covering runBvCommand - disabled mode, JSON parsing, arg forwarding, cwd passing, error handling for throws and malformed JSON
Add comprehensive BeadsFeatureStore tests - complete(), exists(), list() sorted results, list() error handling, and save() + exists() integration
Add comprehensive BeadsPlanStore tests for isApproved (label check, description match, missing epic) and revokeApproval (label removal, safe when epic missing)
Fix specFormatter rendering 'undefined' for completed tasks without summary - now omits colon+summary when summary is missing instead of printing literal 'undefined'
Verify: 1075 tests passing across 45 files, all clean
Verify: 1075 tests passing, comprehensive exploration complete
Add comprehensive FilesystemTaskStore tests - list ordering, getNextOrder, delete, save, writeReport, getRunnableTasks null return, and flush no-op
Verify: 1085 tests passing across 45 files - 10% improvement from baseline
Add plan-review-gate edge case tests - uppercase X checkbox, all-unchecked validation, section boundary scoping
Add comprehensive slug utility tests - slugifyIdentifierSegment (Unicode, special chars, underscores, hash fallback), deriveDeterministicLocalId (parts, consistency), deriveTaskFolder padding
Add workflow-path edge case tests - heading markers, zero tasks, missing mini-record fields, missing tasks validation, missing mini-record validation
Add trace-context chaining test - verify multi-level child span creation preserves traceId and parent chain
Add shell.test.ts edge case for preserving plus signs and dots in safe args
Verify: 1106 tests across 45 files, 12.1% improvement from baseline, all checks pass
Verify: 1106 tests, 12.1% above baseline - continuing deep exploration
Verify: 1106 tests stable, continuing to explore edge cases in plan section extraction
Add comprehensive FilesystemFeatureStore tests - exists, create (structure, duplicates, ticket, deterministic epicBeadId), get, list (sorting, filtering), save, complete, reopen

Add comprehensive FilesystemPlanStore tests - approve (hash storage, no-op on missing), isApproved (matching, changed, missing, non-approved status), revokeApproval (field cleanup, no-op guards), syncPlanDescription no-op
Add defaults.test.ts - validate DEFAULT_AGENT_MODELS format, DEFAULT_WARCRAFT_CONFIG structure, agent skills/autoLoadSkills assignments, model consistency
Add specFormatter edge case tests - inferTaskType (greenfield, modification, testing, no directives, no plan), dependency rendering (unresolved, multiple), multiple context files, completed tasks

Add agentsMdService edge case tests - language detection (TS, Python, Go, Rust), package manager detection (pnpm, yarn, npm), test framework detection (vitest, jest), template generation, sync finding extraction patterns, invalid package.json
Add contextService extra tests for beadsMode off - write/read, filename normalization, non-existent reads, empty list/compile, delete, single-file stats

Add taskDependencyGraph edge case tests - non-numeric folders, mixed explicit/implicit deps, sequence gaps, all-done state, non-numeric prefix deps, order-0 deps, explicit override, triple prefix collision

Add configService edge case tests - getAgentConfig (dedup, onboarding filter, disableSkills), isOmoSlimEnabled, getStrictTaskTransitions alias, getSandboxConfig persistent defaults, getParallelExecutionConfig edge cases, caching, case-insensitive workflow gates
Add discovery-gate edge case tests - boundary char counts (100/99 full, 40 lightweight), case-insensitive heading, end-of-doc discovery, multiple discovery headings, h3 rejection
Restore original BvTriageService.test.ts (31 tests) that was accidentally overwritten - net +9 tests recovered
Restore original BvTriageService.test.ts (31 tests) that was accidentally overwritten
Add BvTriageService extra tests - global triage metadata extraction, nested triage paths (recommendations, quick_ref), blocker array limits, cache isolation, null cache

Add featureService extra tests - getActive (alphabetical, all-completed, empty), getInfo (null, tasks, no-lister), syncCompletionFromTasks (null, no-tasks, idempotent, non-completed), setSession/getSession, complete edge cases, updateStatus approvedAt, priority boundaries
Add planService extra tests - read (null, planning, approved), write (creation, invalidation, same-content, syncPlanDescription), approve (fatal/ok/preloaded), isApproved after revocation

Add taskService extra tests - timestamp reset on pending transition, preparedAt/startedAt/completedAt preservation, transition error handling, extras pass-through, onTaskStatusChanged callback behavior

Add context-markdown extra tests - ATX closing hashes, special chars in name, blank-line-only body, h1 heading match, no-heading content, BOM+blank lines, single section no-separator, three sections, appendContextContent undefined/empty edge cases

Add outcomes extra tests - ok with null/false/0, isUsable with falsy values, withDiagnostics empty/fatal, fromError null/undefined/empty, collectOutcomes multi-diagnostic, diagnostic ok severity, worstSeverity singles
Add shell.ts extra tests - colons/equals unquoted, empty string, newline/tab/dollar/parens quoting, embedded single quotes, hyphens, mixed safe/unsafe args

Add index.extra tests - path helper coverage for all modes (getWarcraftDir, getFeaturePath, getFeatureJsonPath, getPlanPath, getContextPath, getTasksPath, getTaskPath, getTaskStatusPath, getTaskReportPath, getTaskSpecPath), sanitizeName, normalizePath, fs utility integration

Add task-state-machine extra tests - all same-status transitions, forbidden transitions (pending→done, done→pending), InvalidTransitionError properties, recovery paths (failed→done, blocked→done), cancel from any state

Add beadDecoders extra tests - envelope keys (results/items/data), type field priority, missing fields, dependent issue nested keys (dependent/target/child/to), optional comment/audit fields, extractBeadContent nested/priority/type handling

Add json-lock extra tests - getLockPath, deepMerge (undefined skip, array replace, null replace, nested merge, new keys, empty), writeAtomic, writeJsonAtomic, writeJsonLockedSync, acquireLockSync, updateJsonLockedSync, patchJsonLockedSync
Add logger extra tests - LOG_LEVELS count/values, debug/error level filtering, default console sink routing (error/warn/log), noop logger shape parity, log entry structure

Add fs utility extra tests - readJson (nested, null, string, number, boolean), writeJson (deep dirs, special chars), writeText (empty, multiline), readText with BOM, ensureDir idempotency, fileExists broken symlink

Add paths extra tests - listFeatureDirectories (non-existent, hidden dirs, .worktrees, files-only, beads mode), sanitizeName (empty/whitespace throws), normalizePath (empty, mixed, UNC), path mode consistency, getTaskPath beads mode restriction

Add slug extra tests - slugifyTaskName (lowercase, spaces, empty hash fallback, single word, edge hyphens, numbers), deriveTaskFolder (padding, 2-digit, 100+), deriveDeterministicLocalId (consistency, uniqueness, prefix), slugifyIdentifierSegment (CamelCase, special chars, consecutive hyphens)
Add detection extra tests - non-worktree with .git dir, worktree with extra subdirs, malformed .git file, docs worktree pattern, findProjectRoot marker priority and cwd marker

Add event-logger extra tests - custom timestamp preservation, getLatestTraceContext (wrong task/feature, missing file, skip no-trace events, omit parentSpanId), computeTrustMetrics (dispatch-only, non-completed commits, blocked MTTR, multiple reopens)
Add transition-journal extra tests - empty file, blank lines, sequence resume after corruption, getPath validation, markCommentWritten ack, high sequence numbers, full field round-trip

Add workflow-path extra tests - detectWorkflowPath (standard, lightweight, heading marker, case-insensitive, non-lightweight, partial), hasLightweightMiniRecord (all fields, each missing, empty), countPlanTasks (h3, h2, empty, whitespace), validateLightweightPlan (valid, violations)
Add createStores factory extra tests - off mode store method verification, on mode requires repository, on mode store methods with mock repository
Add trace-context extra tests - unique traceIds/spanIds, no parentSpanId by default, provided traceId, UUID format, child span preservation, new spanId, chained children, sibling children

Add dockerSandboxService extra tests - validateImage (dots, underscores, hyphens, uppercase, empty, spaces, pipe, ampersand), buildRunCommand (--rm, -w, sh -c), containerName (lowercase, special chars), stopContainer (-f flag, timeout)

Add beadStatus extra tests - mapBeadStatusToTaskStatus (open, claimed, working, empty, whitespace, deferred with empty/unrecognized/blocked labels), mapBeadStatusToFeatureStatus (open, claimed, working, in_progress, review, hooked, deferred, whitespace, mixed case)
Add beadMapping extra tests - removeLabels count verification for all statuses, defer label correctness, single action per status, removeLabels immutability between calls

Add specFormatter more edge case tests - case-insensitive directives, modification priority, unrecognized directives, planSection trimming, empty sections omitted, long folder names, section ordering verification

Add types.test.ts - compile-time validation of all exported types (TaskStatusType, FeatureStatusType, TaskOrigin, BeadsMode, FeatureJson, TaskStatus, TaskInfo, PlanReadResult, SpecData, ContextFile, BeadsModeProvider, FeatureInfo)
Add taskService more tests - get/getRawStatus null for missing, list empty/sorted, writeReport, computeRunnableStatus (all runnable, blocked dependency)
Add bv-runner extra tests - format json appending, multiple args, executor error handling, null/numeric/string/nested JSON output, cwd passing

Add defaults extra tests - model sharing (khadgar/mimiron/saurfang), model uniqueness (brann/mekkatorque/algalon), $schema URL, enableToolsFor empty, agent skills (saurfang, algalon), temperature ordering (brann highest, mimiron≤khadgar), autoLoadSkills arrays
Add contextService more tests - replace mode overwrite, compile multi-file, list all files, archive empties context, stats multi-file totalChars, write no-warning, delete/read non-existent

Add agentsMdService more tests - finding pattern extraction (we use X, prefer X over Y, build command, lives in /path), heading skip, empty proposals, deduplication with casing, apply rejection, isNew flag

Add configService more tests - getPath format, set directory creation, set merge behavior, multiple sets, empty set, getAgentConfig all agents, getHookCadence null, getBeadsMode null, isOmoSlimEnabled null, getDisabledSkills/Mcps lists
Add plan-review-gate extra tests - missing checklist, all unchecked, all checked [x]/[X], section boundary scoping, partial check, formatPlanReviewChecklistIssues header/bullets
Add transition-journal more tests - multiple markCommentWritten sequential entries, append with all optional fields, 10 sequential appends with strictly increasing seq
Add specFormatter combined scenario tests - full spec with all sections, minimal spec, only dependencies, only context, only completed tasks with mixed summary presence
Add featureService more tests - create sanitizes name, default priority, list empty/sorted, patchMetadata update/throw, updateStatus throw/save path, getActive skips completed
Add BeadGatewayError tests - code/message constructor, optional internalCode, instanceof Error chain, stack trace, undefined internalCode
Add taskService.buildSpecData tests - correct structure, plan section extraction by task name, null planContent, context file pass-through, completed tasks pass-through
Add beadsMode extra tests with BeadsModeProvider - isBeadsEnabled on/off, requireBeadsEnabled throw/no-throw, context in error message
Add fs-feature-store more tests - create with optional fields, save update, sorted list with many features, complete/reopen round-trip, exists behavior for directory-only, list filtering

Add task-state-machine comprehensive coverage - every status has outgoing transitions, pending reachability, done only from in_progress, cancelled from every status, no self-loops in allowed list, total transition count bounds
Add fs-plan-store more tests - approve/isApproved round-trip, different content hashes, approve overwrite, revokeApproval, field preservation through approve/revoke, syncPlanDescription no-op
Add event-logger type system tests - WARCRAFT_EVENT_TYPES count, contains verification_run, readonly, lowercase, no duplicates, noopEventLogger emit/getLatestTraceContext/all-types-no-throw
Add beadDecoders robustness tests - numeric id coercion, null title handling, empty arrays/envelopes, primitive decodeShowPayload types, extractBeadContent body/whitespace/nested item/items
Add outcomes integration tests - severity escalation pipeline (ok→degraded→fatal), mixed collectOutcomes aggregation, isUsable discrimination, fromError various types, diagnostic with rich context
Add planService integration tests - write→approve→read, write→approve→write(different)→read, write→approve→write(same)→read, preloaded content, revokeApproval, non-existent feature

Add comprehensive artifactSchemas tests - TaskState encode/decode round-trip, legacy migration, null/invalid input, default fields, workerSession/blocker preservation; WorkerPrompt legacy string/object migration, invalid JSON fallback; TaskReport round-trip/migration; TaskSpec markdown generation; taskStateFromTaskStatus/taskStateToTaskStatus round-trip

Restore original BeadsViewerGateway.test.ts, add BeadsViewerGateway.extra.test.ts with deduplicated tasks, unblocks extraction, reason fallback, cycle key variants (bead_ids/nodes/ids), health tracking, empty track_id, invalid plan structures

Restore original BeadsViewerGateway.test.ts, add BeadsRepository error utility tests - RepositoryError construction/instanceof, getRepositoryInternalCode from BeadGatewayError/RepositoryError/Error/non-Error, isRepositoryInitFailure codes, throwIfInitFailure

Add BeadsRepository error utility tests - RepositoryError constructor/instanceof/all-codes, getRepositoryInternalCode from BeadGatewayError/RepositoryError/Error/non-Error, isRepositoryInitFailure for init codes, throwIfInitFailure context propagation

Add fs-task-store extra tests - createTask local ID generation, idempotent overwrite, get null/fields, list empty/sorted, getNextOrder edge cases, delete/no-op, save overwrite, patchBackground non-clobbering, writeReport file creation, getRunnableTasks null, flush no-op

Add context-markdown more tests - BOM stripping, redundant heading removal, trailing hashes, special char normalization, empty content heading, renderContextSections hr separator/single/empty, appendContextContent null/undefined/empty/whitespace/join/trim

Add beadMapping/beadStatus comprehensive tests - getTaskBeadActions for all 8 statuses with action type verification, mapBeadStatusToTaskStatus for open/closed/tombstone/in_progress/review/hooked/blocked/deferred with labels/priority/case-insensitive

Add trace-context more tests - unique traceId/spanId generation (100/50 samples), explicit traceId, UUID format, no parentSpanId on root, createChildSpan preserves traceId/sets parentSpanId/new spanId, chain/sibling span behavior

Add slug more tests - deriveTaskFolder padding/special chars/long names/emoji, slugifyTaskName case/spaces/consecutive hyphens, slugifyIdentifierSegment hyphens/underscores/uppercase, deriveDeterministicLocalId determinism/uniqueness/prefix

Add task-state-machine exhaustive matrix tests - validateTransition no-throw for all allowed transitions, throws for all disallowed, same-status never throws, transition symmetry checks (7 specific pairs)
Add beadStatus mapBeadStatusToFeatureStatus tests - open→planning, closed→completed, in_progress→executing, empty→planning, unknown→planning, case insensitive

Add discovery-gate more tests - substantial discovery passes, missing/too-short discovery fails, end-of-file discovery, case insensitive heading, lightweight workflow shorter discovery, lightweight without mini-record fails

Add workflow-path more tests - detectWorkflowPath markers/case-insensitive/standard, countPlanTasks numbered/zero/single/many/non-numbered, hasLightweightMiniRecord all fields/missing each/empty/case-insensitive

Add taskDependencyGraph more tests - single task runnable, done excluded, chain ordering, parallel all runnable, diamond deps, in_progress not satisfying, cancelled not satisfying, empty list, non-existent dep, all done empty

Add fs utilities more tests - ensureDir nested/idempotent, fileExists file/non-existent/directory, writeJson/readJson round-trip/null/SyntaxError/parent-dirs/overwrite, writeText/readText round-trip/null/parent-dirs

Add paths more tests - sanitizeName throws for empty/path-separators/dotdot/dot-prefix, preserves valid names; getWarcraftPath docs/beads; getFeaturePath/getPlanPath/getTasksPath/getTaskPath/getTaskStatusPath/getTaskReportPath path structure
Add detection more tests - detectContext projectRoot match, feature/task null-or-string, isWorktree boolean, temp dir without warcraft; findProjectRoot from cwd, null for temp, string type
Add logger more tests - createNoopLogger all methods exist/no-throw/extra args, createConsoleLogger all methods exist/no-throw/context
Add types more tests - FeatureJson required/status-types/optional fields, TaskStatus required/workerSession/blocker/learnings, all TaskStatusType values, BeadsMode values
Add contextService integration tests - read null for non-existent, constructor with provider, write/read round-trip, list empty for non-existent. MILESTONE: DOUBLED THE BASELINE (987→1975, +100.1%)
Add logger LOG_LEVELS tests - 4 levels, debug<info<warn<error, non-negative; createConsoleLogger options - minLevel/prefix/no-options/sink-receives-entries/sink-context/minLevel-filters
Add json-lock more tests - writeJsonLockedSync create/overwrite/nested-object, patchJsonLockedSync merge, acquireLock returns release function, lock/release cycle
Add shell more tests - shellQuoteArg empty/simple/spaces/special/quotes/newlines, structuredToCommandString combine/no-args/quoted-args/single. MILESTONE: 2000+ TESTS (987→2002, +102.8%)

Add outcomes comprehensive tests - ok wrap/string/null/object/empty-diags, okVoid, degraded severity/diags, fatal severity/no-value/diags, diagnostic code-message/severity/default/context, isUsable ok/degraded/fatal, worstSeverity empty, withDiagnostics add/preserve, fromError error/string/default-severity/explicit, collectOutcomes all-ok/mixed/empty/merged-diags
Add specFormatter comprehensive tests - feature name, task folder, plan section/null, context files single/multiple, completed tasks, dependencies, all tasks, empty cases
Add beadsMode more tests - isBeadsEnabled on/off, requireBeadsEnabled no-throw/throws/context
Add defaults more tests - DEFAULT_AGENT_MODELS all 6 agents/non-empty strings/count, DEFAULT_WARCRAFT_CONFIG agents/parallelExecution/maxConcurrency/beadsMode/agentMode/sandbox

Add index barrel exports more tests - DEFAULT_AGENT_MODELS, DEFAULT_WARCRAFT_CONFIG, detectContext, findProjectRoot, ensureDir, fileExists, readJson, writeJson, LOG_LEVELS, loggers, sanitizeName, getWarcraftPath, shellQuoteArg, slugifyTaskName, ok, fatal, isUsable
